title: Boho Style Cream White Ceramic Vases Set - Decorative Flower Vases for Living Room, Dining Table, Hallway Console & Fireplace, Modern Dresser and Shelf Decor
features: Usage Scenes：Perfect for decorating large shelves, bookcases, console tables (entryway/sofa/fireplace), mantels, or as a standalone centerpiece in living rooms, hallways, or patios. Its versatile design blends seamlessly with boho, rustic, or eclectic interiors.

Siamese Embrace Design：Handcrafted with a poetic twist, this vase features two figures nestled together in an eternal embrace. The interlinked design ensures stability during use, while the hollow center doubles as a functional vase neck—ideal for floral arrangements or dried branches. Its sculptural form makes it a striking art piece even without flowers.

Matte-Textured Premium Ceramic：Fired at high temperatures for durability, the vase boasts a refined sandy finish with subtle imperfections that celebrate artisanal craftsmanship. The thick walls resist chipping, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor spaces (e.g., covered porches).

Dimensions & Style: Set includes one matte off-white handmade vase. Overall length: 9.8 inches (25 cm); Neck opening: 1.3 inches (3.3 cm). Uniquely boho with organic curves and a neutral hue that complements any palette.
Secure Packaging: Shipped in foam-padded inner boxes to prevent transit damage, ensuring a delightful unboxing experience.
description: Product Description Ceramic vases are suitable for any flowers or tables and shelves Entrance table decoration Fireplace decoration Dining table decoration TV cabinet decoration Window sill decoration Coffee table decoration Bookshelf decoration Kitchen countertop decoration Special practical gifts for wives or couples This handmade vase design features a unique scene of two couples embracing each other, with a hollow in the middle that is not only a vase but also a work of art

specifications_table.Room Type: Bathroom, Bedroom, Dining Room, Kitchen, Living Room
